items.caption: A stylized, flat design illustration of a medicine chest with various items typically found in a first aid kit. the chest is depicted with a pink lid and a blue body, and it features a prominent red cross symbol, universally recognized as a sign of medical aid. surrounding the chest are icons representing essential medicines and supplies, including a bottle, a syringe, a band-aid, and a thermometer, among others. the background is plain white, emphasizing the items in the foreground. below the illustration, the text "medicine chest" is written in bold, capital letters, confirming the theme of the image. the overall style is simple and graphic, with a limited color palette and clean lines.
